title: feat: add nanobanana-2 (Gemini 3.1 Flash Image) and upgrade gemini-large to 3.1 Pro
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Fresh fruit in the garden
gist.blurb: We've planted `nanobanana-2` (Gemini 3.1 Flash) in the image garden. It's faster, smarter, and ready to paint your prompts.
gist.summary: Added `nanobanana-2` (Gemini 3.1 Flash Image) and upgraded the core `gemini-large` model to 3.1 Pro for enhanced generation quality.
gist.impact: Users can now access the faster Gemini 3.1 Flash model for images, while the default large model receives a significant quality upgrade.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee discovering a glowing 'nanobanana' fruit in a digital orchard. Represents the new model addition.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot discovering a glowing, futuristic pixel-banana hanging from a code-tree in a digital orchard. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, chunky sprites.
